props.description: The static color style to apply. Useful when the ActionButton appears over a color background.
Whether the button should be displayed with a [quiet style](https://spectrum.adobe.com/page/action-button/#Quiet).
The content to display in the button.
Whether the button should be displayed with an [emphasized style](https://spectrum.adobe.com/page/action-button/#Emphasis).
When used in a ToggleButtonGroup, an identifier for the item in `selectedKeys`. When used standalone, a DOM id.
Spectrum-defined styles, returned by the `style()` macro.
